_comment: Operator-managed legitimacy rule table. Edit this file to tune rules — do not modify legitimacy_rules.py. Each rule contributes its score when ALL conditions match. Final rule_score = min(1.0, sum of triggered rule scores).

_fields.quantity_bp: int — number of base pairs ordered
_fields.institution_verified: bool — whether the institution was independently verified

rules.name: unknown_end_use
rules.description: End use is unknown or unspecified — unable to assess plausibility.

rules.name: personal_end_use
rules.description: End use declared as personal — implausible for synthetic DNA orders.

rules.name: unknown_customer_type
rules.description: Customer type is unknown — cannot assess plausibility of stated end use.

rules.name: individual_residential
rules.description: Individual customer at a residential address — high-risk combination for DNA synthesis.

rules.name: individual_po_box
rules.description: Individual customer using a PO box — concealed address for an individual order.

rules.name: po_box_address
rules.description: PO box address for any customer — reduces traceability.

rules.name: unknown_address
rules.description: Address type is unknown — cannot assess physical location plausibility.

rules.name: unverified_academic
rules.description: Academic customer with unverified institution — claimed affiliation cannot be confirmed.

rules.name: unverified_government
rules.description: Government customer with unverified institution — claimed affiliation cannot be confirmed.

rules.name: large_order_unverified
rules.description: Order exceeds 5000bp from an unverified institution — volume warrants additional scrutiny.

rules.name: very_large_order
rules.description: Order exceeds 20000bp — unusually large synthesis request regardless of customer type.

rules.name: commercial_end_use_individual
rules.description: Individual customer declaring commercial end use — implausible combination.
